case_title: AMY GUSTINCIC et al VS. SEIKI OKADA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUSTINCIC, AMY BAGGATTA, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OKADA, SEIKI $7,271.27 PRINCIPAL, $228.73 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,560.00, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT OKADA SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS THE AMOUNTS OF $4350.00 REPRESENTING THE SECURITY DEPOSIT, $228.73 FOR INTEREST ON THE SECURITY DEPOSIT, $2921.27 REPRESENTING DAMAGES FOR BAD FAITH RETENTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT PER CCP 1950.50(L), AND 60.00 COSTS FOR A TOTAL JEDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $7560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SEIKI OKADA SET FOR MAR-21-2008 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SEIKI OKADA IS GRANTED. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. CASE SETTLED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GUSTINCIC, AMY BAGGATTA, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT OKADA, SEIKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUSTINCIC, AMY BAGGATTA, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT OKADA, SEIKI
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SNET TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFT.

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM MOTION OF JUN-16-2008 AT 3:30PM. NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506) (CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-18-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OKADA, SEIKI
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGEMENT - GRANTED, RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OKADA, SEIKI HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT OKADA, SEIKI
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFT.
